description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface and prominent black seams dividing the ball into eight panels. The ball features the 'Spalding' brand logo in gold and black, as well as the NBA logo, both clearly visible on one side. The surface appears slightly matte with a grippy finish, typical for outdoor and indoor play. The ball is spherical and appears to be made primarily of rubber or synthetic leather, with an air-filled interior. There are no visible signs of wear, scuff marks, or graffiti, and the inflation valve is not visible in any of the views. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, suitable for use in urban parks, courts, or recreational areas.
description: A clean, orange Spalding basketball with black seams, gold branding, and a textured, grippy surface. The NBA logo is also visible, and the ball shows no signs of wear.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with two main black seams running vertically and a partial view of the Spalding logo on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the NBA logo and the full Spalding brand logo, both clearly visible on the ball's surface.
description_view_2: The ball is shown from the opposite side of view 0, with the black seams prominent and a partial logo visible on the right.
description_view_3: The Spalding logo is centered and fully visible, with the NBA logo at the bottom and the ball's pebbled texture clearly shown.
attribute_brand_logo: Spalding logo in gold and black on one panel, NBA logo in black and gold on an adjacent panel.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with black seams forming a traditional basketball pattern.
